string.description: Everything in Tcl is a string; the fundamental data type for all values

list.signature: {a b c} or [list a b c]
list.description: Ordered collection of elements, represented as a specially formatted string

dict.description: Ordered dictionary mapping string keys to values, a modern alternative to arrays

integer.description: Arbitrary-precision integer using the string representation of whole numbers

double.description: IEEE 754 double-precision floating-point number in string representation

boolean.description: Multiple accepted string representations for boolean values in conditionals

channel.description: I/O channel identifier for file operations, network sockets, and pipes

namespace.description: Hierarchical naming scope for organizing procedures and variables
